name: Noli - Forsaken
description:
-"BAAABE! I DID A CRIIIME!!"-

🌹 I had to stop in the middle of writing the first message multiple times to start snickering at this shit.

🌹 I present to you: Noli being an absolute menace. Have fun keeping him in line 🙏

🌹 POV is recommended to be 007n7. Or you can use an OC I guess.. But {{user}} is a man. I'm not changing my mind. Sorry.

🌹 Established relationship btw, you're dating. Good luck with that.

🌹 Do NOT ask for a fem/anypov

🌹 Trans user friendly 👍

🌹 If you don't like, don't use. Simple ❤
creator: -Shattered-Rose-
